title: Roll out an edge function safely
description: Measure runtime budget, test cold start, and stage the function to a fraction of traffic before global deploy.
body: Steps: 1. Measure the function's CPU-ms, memory, and bundle size against platform limits. 2. Remove filesystem/stateful assumptions. 3. Test cold-start latency. 4. Deploy to a canary route or fraction of PoPs. 5. Watch error/kill rates, then expand. Rollback point: keep the previous version deployable for instant revert. Validation: error and CPU-limit-kill rates stay flat as traffic ramps. Note: edge deploys are global and fast to propagate — a bad function affects everyone, so canary first.
